---
title: "Consulting"
toc: false
citation: false
---

## Statistical Consulting & Data Science Advisory

I provide statistical consulting and data science advisory services through **California State University, Bakersfield**. Whether you need rigorous statistical analysis, predictive modeling, or a data science strategy, I bring the methodological depth of academic research and the practical focus of applied problem-solving to every engagement.

All consulting engagements are conducted through CSUB's institutional framework.

::: {.service-grid}

::: {.service-card}
#### Study Design & Analysis
Design rigorous studies that produce defensible results. From experimental design to observational study methodology — get it right from the start.
:::

::: {.service-card}
#### Time Series & Forecasting
Financial volatility modeling, demand forecasting, epidemiological trends, and environmental monitoring. Specializing in GARCH-family models and hybrid ML approaches.
:::

::: {.service-card}
#### Machine Learning & Prediction
Build models that generalize. Random forests, gradient boosting, neural networks, and deep learning for structured and sequential data — with interpretability built in.
:::

::: {.service-card}
#### Environmental & Health Analytics
Air quality analysis, exposure assessment, pollution modeling, and public health data analysis. Experience with EPA AQS data, sensor networks, and multi-pollutant frameworks.
:::

::: {.service-card}
#### AI Strategy & Implementation
Custom GPT development, LLM integration for education and business workflows, and organizational AI readiness assessment. Presented with OpenAI at NextTech Kern.
:::

::: {.service-card}
#### Training & Workshops
Custom workshops on R, Python, SAS, statistics, machine learning, and AI for your team. Designed for practical skill-building with real data.
:::

:::


## How I Work

**1. Discovery** — We discuss your problem, data, and goals in an initial conversation.

**2. Proposal** — I provide a clear scope, timeline, methodology, and quote through CSUB.

**3. Engagement** — I do the work, with regular check-ins and transparent communication.

**4. Delivery** — You receive a complete report with reproducible code, clear visualizations, and actionable recommendations.


## Credentials

- **Ph.D. in Mathematics (Statistics Emphasis)** — Missouri University of Science & Technology
- **Assistant Professor** — California State University, Bakersfield
- **Active researcher** with publications in financial econometrics, environmental statistics, and AI in education
- **Experienced with** R, Python, MATLAB, SAS, SQL, LaTeX, Git, TensorFlow, and cloud computing platforms
- **Member** of the American Statistical Association and American Mathematical Society


::: {.cta-section}
### Let's discuss your project
I'm available for analysis projects, advisory relationships, and custom training — all conducted through CSUB. Reach out and we'll find the right approach for your needs.

[Contact me](mailto:ayatawara@csub.edu){.cta-button}
:::
